label: 44915 Exemptions

operate aircraft with certificates for a maximum gross takeoff weight of less than 12,500 pounds; and

board passengers, or load property intended to be carried in an aircraft cabin, that will be screened under at another airport in Alaska before the passengers board, or the property is loaded on, an aircraft for a place outside Alaska.section 44901 of this title
